trans_cap: An adult man with an American accent speaks in a clear, medium-pitched voice. He begins with a short, sharp laugh. His tone is lighthearted and self-deprecating as he speaks at a quick pace: <S>Ah! Thank God for playback. I have no idea what I'm doing.<E>
text_prompt: A fast electronic drum beat is interrupted by a man coughing and laughing, followed by more drumming and speech.

trans_cap: A woman with an American accent speaks in a weary, slightly exasperated tone. <S>Time to go to work again.<E> A man with a clear, mid-range voice and an American accent responds with a wry, deadpan delivery. <S>Thank God we aren't real.<E>
text_prompt: Inside a speeding metro carriage. The deep, rumbling vibration of the train. Loud, whooshing tunnel air pressure and wind noise outside, with the faint, metallic screech and clicking of the rails underneath.

trans_cap: A young woman with an American accent shouts urgently, her voice strained and slightly breathless. <S>Keep going, we are nearly there!<E> A young man, also with an American accent, responds in a questioning and breathless tone. <S>But none of this is real?<E>
text_prompt: An explosion is followed by an urgent female shout and running footsteps, then a questioning male voice speaks.

trans_cap: An adult man with an American accent speaks in a loud, forceful, and interrogative tone. His voice is clear and projected as he demands: <S>Where were you on the night of the bubble bath?<E> A series of high-pitched squeaks, like a rubber toy, immediately follows.
text_prompt: A man speaks intensely, answered by a high-pitched squeaky toy, before dramatic orchestral string music swells.

trans_cap: A middle-aged man with a British accent speaks in a deep, hushed, and urgent tone: <S>The microfilm is in your ticket.<E> A woman, also with a British accent, replies in a similarly tense and quiet voice: <S>They're watching the north exit. Use the service tunnel.<E>
text_prompt: A man with a mid-pitched voice speaks, followed by a woman's urgent reply, amidst the ambient chatter and echo of a bustling public hall.

trans_cap: A mature adult male with a British accent speaks in a deep, resonant, and slightly gravelly timbre. His delivery is slow and deliberate, with a dramatic, reverent tone, as if narrating or reciting poetry: <S>This ocean, it's a force, a wild, untamed might. And she commands your awe with every breaking light.<E>
text_prompt: ontinuous, gentle sound of rhythmic ocean waves lapping on a sandy shore, accompanied by the faint, intermittent calling of seagulls in the distance. High quality nature ambience.

trans_cap: A middle-aged man with a clear, standard American accent asks in a challenging tone: <S>How high can you kick?<E> A second man with a distinct East Asian accent replies in a calm, confident, higher-pitched voice: <S>Higher than that light.<E> Following the sound of a powerful kick and a shattering lightbulb, an announcer with a deep, resonant voice exclaims over an astonished crowd: <S>Ladies and gentlemen, the one and only...<E>
text_prompt: Two men speak, followed by a loud shattering sound. A crowd gasps and cheers before an announcer's voice is heard.
